analysis.name: Solstice
analysis.summary: SLX近期因上线MEXC、Bitget等CEX及空投活动推动价格大幅上涨，但空投抛压和FDV较高带来回调风险。项目定位机构级链上收益层，基本面有亮点，但当前估值偏高，短期波动剧烈。

recommendation.invalidation: 价格跌破0.18美元（近期低点）或成交量持续萎缩

catalysts: 空投活动及3倍积分活动吸引用户
机构级收益层概念受关注

latestNews.title: Solstice launches SLX token for fast-growing Solana yield ecosystem
latestNews.reason: 代币正式上线，项目进入市场流通阶段

latestNews.title: MEXC Lists Solstice Finance (SLX) with 200,000 SLX and 40,000 USDT Airdrop+ Rewards
latestNews.reason: CEX上线带来流动性和曝光，空投活动刺激短期需求

latestNews.title: Solstice airdrop claimers, selling pressure drags SLX price down nearly 50%
latestNews.reason: 空投领取者抛售导致价格大幅下跌，显示抛压风险

latestNews.title: Solstice Token Price is Soaring Today, and Why SLX is at Risk of a Crash
latestNews.reason: 媒体警告价格飙升后存在回调风险

fundamentals: Solstice是Solana上的DeFi协议，提供机构级收益产品（如Delta中性资金费率捕获、代币化企业信贷等）
代币总供应量10亿，当前流通约2.43亿，FDV约5.66亿美元
项目获得Binance Alpha Spotlight关注，但尚未上线币安
团队背景未明确，合约风险需注意
marketRead: 24小时涨幅27%，7日涨幅206%，短期涨幅巨大
DEX流动性约2亿美元，但交易量仅3.8万美元，流动性深度不足
价格从ATH 0.63美元回落约10%，近期波动剧烈
空投抛售曾导致价格腰斩，显示市场情绪脆弱
risks: 空投抛压持续，解锁供应可能进一步打压价格
FDV较高（5.66亿美元），当前市值1.38亿美元，估值偏贵
DEX流动性虽大但交易量低，大额卖出易滑点
项目刚上线，合约未经审计风险
市场情绪过热，短期回调风险大
watchlist: 空投解锁进度及抛售情况
sourceNotes: 数据来源CoinMarketCap、DexScreener、Google News，部分新闻标题可能不完整
DEX价格与CMC价格差异较大（0.2233 vs 0.568），需注意数据源一致性
无链上持仓分布数据，无法评估大户行为

profile.name: Solstice
profile.description: Solstice is the Yield Layer, a protocol bringing institutional-grade yield products on-chain for DeFi composability. Most on-chain yield has been leveraged on volatile assets. Institutional yield strategies, like delta-neutral funding capture, tokenized corporate credit, and sovereign-rate exposure, have historically sat behind compliance perimeters that public chains couldn't cross. Solstice closes that gap. The protocol wraps licensed off-chain strategies in a standard on-chain container, so the yield they produce flows across the DeFi ecosystem as composable tokens. Built for institutions. Open to everyone.
